case_title: STEPHENS, SCOTT et al vs. BROWN, KAREN ROGERS et al

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, KAREN ROGERS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 736 JONES #65, STAYED UNTIL JUL-14-1995, IF DEFT VACATES ON TIME, PLTFS WAIVE ALL MONEY BUT KEEP SECURITY DEPOSIT. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE, PLTFS MAY HAVE AMENDED JDMT FOR MONEY.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEPHENS, SCOTT STEPHENS, ELISA AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, KAREN ROGERS DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
